titleStmt.title: SII 39.208: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 208. (A.R. No. 208 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE MARATAKAVALLINACHCHIYAR SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE VĪRAVEṄKAṬAPATI DĒVA MAHĀRĀYA, ‘WHO LEVIED TRIBUTE FROM ALL COUNTRIES’-ŚAKA 1514 (1592 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to gift of land by purchase in Tuṟaiyūr for the supply of food offerings to the shrine of Maragatavaḷḷi-Nāchchiyār as per the agreement between the Jīyar, Eṭṭūr-Tirumalai-Kumāra Tatāchārya, and others of the temple of Pōreṟṟu-nāyiṉār at Tiruppuṭkuli in Dāmaṟkōṭṭam, a sub-division of Dāmaṟnāḍu, situated in Sōḻiṅgapura paṟṟu which belonged to Chandragirirājya in Jayaṅgoṇḍa-Chōḻamaṇḍalam. It also mentions the donor Nāgama Nāyaka, son of Timma Nāyaka, grandson of Pāppu Nāyaka, and great grandson of Veṅgaḷappa Nāyaka of Vēlūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man mahāmaṇṭaleśvara rājātirāja rājaparameśvara rājamāṟttāṇṭa rājakulatilakan Emmaṇṭalamum tiṟaikoṇṭa pūṟuva dakṣiṇa paścimottira catu samuttirātiśvaran śrī virapratāpa śrī viraveṅkaṭapati teva mahārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟttam 1000 5 100 10 4ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa ṉantaṉa saṅvasattarattu meṣaṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tutikaiyum Ātivāramum peṟṟa Asvati ṉakṣattirattu ṉāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu cantirakiri rācciyattu coḷiṅkapurapaṟṟu tāmalṉāṭu tāmalkkoṭṭat tiruppatit tiruppuṭkkuḻi perumāḷ poreṟṟu nayiṉār kovil keḻviciyarum paṇṭārattārum śrīkāriyam ceyyum Eṭṭur tirumalakkumāra tāttāccāriyar
Ayyaṉum stalam Eḻuniṟuvākakāṟarum velūril Irukkum tuṅkaḷa kottirattu veṅkaḷappaṉāyakkar pāppaṉāyakkar kumāra timmaṉāyakkar ṉākamaṉāyakkarkku cilā cāsaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttapaṭi tuṟaiūr kiṟāmam Aṅkuṣam 3- l Oru Aṅkucam ṉākaṉātaṟkku poy tāṅkaḷ vicayarākavapperumāḷ kovilil Aṅkucam Oṉṟu kiṟayamāka koṇṭa pon_ 2 100 7 10 5 yatu � Aṭṭavaṇai veṅkaṭayaṉ Aṅkuṣam Oṉṟum kiṟayamāka koṇṭa pon_ 2 100 7 10 5 Āka kiṟayamāka koṇṭa pon_ 5 100 5 10- kku Aṅkuṣam 2- m tāṅkaḷ Eṟi Aruḷa paṇṇivitta poroṟṟu nayiṉār ṉācciyār marutakavalli ṉācciyārukku poliyūṭṭāy tāraivāṟkkaiyil yinta kiṟāmam Aṅkuṣam 2- l varum palaṉ varuṣa[ 1- kku] ø3 100 6 10 yitu � pon_ 3 100 6 10 yitukku tiṉavaḻi ciṟappu Añcu taḷikaiyum tiṉam 1- kku Eri karumpu ø(1/4) poy taḷi
kai melukku kariyamutu ney paruppu tayir ømukkāl Amutu ceyita taḷikai 5kku stalam ṉiṟuvākakāṟarukkut vipoyāramāñki kūṭam Uḷpaṭa parateciyaḷukku taḷikai � kaṟiyamutu ø tiṉakkaṭṭaḷaiyāka yintappaṭi cantāṉa paramparai cantirātittavaraiyum Ācantiṉāṟkka stāyiyāka ṉaṭattak kaṭavārākavu yintappaṭikku cilāccāsaṉam paṇṇik kuṭuttom koyil keḻviciyar tāttāccāriyar Ayyaṉ Eḻuniṟuvākakāṟarum Ōm Inta cilācāsanam Eḻutinamaikku koyilk kaṇakku tiruppuṭkuḻippiriyaṉ kāttamuttu vicaiyarākavan Eḻuttu 2+ yinta taṟmam pāṭupaṭṭu muticcavar tāṇaiyam kuruvarājā
Digital edition of SII 39.208 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
